# Anduril Announces Major California Expansion with New Long Beach Campus

Anduril is establishing a new 1.18-million-square-foot campus in Long Beach, California, supporting approximately 5,500 direct jobs and expanding capacity to meet growing demand from the U.S. military and allied partners.
